creator: nmingotti@gmail.com
text:
If you install only packages then, sometimes, installing a new sofware, a whole big set of packages gets upgraded. 

A short time ago (~ 2 weeks maybe) I installed something and ruby package was automatically upgraded to 2.5.X (i guess, now i can't go back in time and check) 

After that, one of my programs broke. And it broke because of the "to_local" method is missing.

But, I guess you are right, I must have installed the gem instead of the package a few months ago, when i developed the program. Indeed "to_local" comes with version 2.0. And i watend to use it. I see the package still uses the gem 1.2.5.
https://github.com/tzinfo/tzinfo/releases

So, I close the bug, It was my mistake. Apologies.

P.S. 
Is there some special reason why we don't have the new 2.0 gem in the port ?
